Amar Dedic.note: Bosnia's high-energy right-back, useful for carrying play up the flank, recovering quickly, and serving early balls into the box.
Amar Dedic.noteZh: 阿马尔·德迪奇是波黑高能量右后卫，能沿边路推进、快速回追，并早早把球送入禁区。

Amar Memic.note: Bosnia's direct wide runner, giving them dribbles from the flank, diagonal movement inside, and pressure on opposing full-backs.
Amar Memic.noteZh: 阿马尔·梅米奇是波黑直接型边路球员，能从边路带球、斜插内线，并向对方边后卫施压。

Amir Hadziahmetovic.note: Bosnia's midfield stabilizer, useful for screening counterattacks, playing the first forward pass, and calming possession after pressure.
Amir Hadziahmetovic.noteZh: 阿米尔·哈季艾哈迈托维奇是波黑中场稳定器，能保护反击路线、送出第一脚向前传球，并在受压后稳住控球。

Arjan Malic.note: Bosnia's young right-back option, helping with timed challenges, overlap support, and back-post cover when the far side is overloaded.
Arjan Malic.noteZh: 阿尔扬·马利奇是波黑年轻右后卫选择，能把握抢断时机、支援套边，并在远端被压制时保护后点。

Armin Gigovic.note: Bosnia's box-to-box runner, giving them second-ball energy, vertical midfield support, and late arrivals around the penalty area.
Armin Gigovic.noteZh: 阿明·吉戈维奇是波黑的往返型中场，能争抢第二落点、纵向支援中场，并后插上到禁区周围。

Benjamin Tahirovic.note: Bosnia's holding midfielder, useful for protecting the centre, switching play, and adding height when midfield duels become physical.
Benjamin Tahirovic.noteZh: 本亚明·塔希罗维奇是波黑的拖后中场，能保护中路、转移进攻，并在中场对抗变得强硬时增加高度。

Dennis Hadzikadunic.note: Bosnia's centre-back marker, giving them duel strength, a steadier defensive line, and reliable set-piece defending.
Dennis Hadzikadunic.noteZh: 丹尼斯·哈季卡杜尼奇是波黑中卫盯防者，能提供对抗强度、更稳定的防线，以及可靠的定位球防守。

Dzenis Burnic.note: Bosnia's combative midfielder, useful for disrupting rhythm, keeping short passes moving, and playing through pressure in central areas.
Dzenis Burnic.noteZh: 杰尼斯·布尔尼奇是波黑强硬型中场，能打断对手节奏、保持短传流动，并在中路压力下完成出球。

Edin Dzeko.note: Bosnia's captain and reference striker, turning direct service into hold-up play, box finishing, and calm leadership late in matches.
Edin Dzeko.noteZh: 埃丁·哲科是波黑队长和锋线支点，能把直接传球转化为背身拿球、禁区终结，以及比赛后段的冷静领导力。

Ermedin Demirovic.note: Bosnia's mobile forward, giving them front-line pressing, clean link play, and aggressive near-post movement when crosses arrive.
Ermedin Demirovic.noteZh: 埃尔梅丁·德米罗维奇是波黑机动型前锋，能前场压迫、清晰衔接进攻，并在传中到来时冲击前点。

Ermin Mahmic.note: Bosnia's young attacking midfielder, useful for receiving between lines, turning quickly, and slipping passes into runners.
Ermin Mahmic.noteZh: 埃尔明·马赫米奇是波黑年轻攻击型中场，能在两线之间接球、快速转身，并把传球塞给前插队友。

Esmir Bajraktarevic.note: Bosnia's creative winger, giving them one-on-one threat, left-footed service, and quick transition carries from wide areas.
Esmir Bajraktarevic.noteZh: 埃斯米尔·巴伊拉克塔雷维奇是波黑创造型边锋，能提供一对一威胁、左脚输送，以及从边路发起的快速转换推进。

Haris Tabakovic.note: Bosnia's penalty-area finisher, useful for attacking crosses, finding space between centre-backs, and shooting from loose second phases.
Haris Tabakovic.noteZh: 哈里斯·塔巴科维奇是波黑禁区终结者，能冲击传中、在中卫之间找空间，并在二次进攻乱战中完成射门。

Ivan Basic.note: Bosnia's central connector, helping the midfield carry into space, offer safer passing angles, and keep attacks from breaking down.
Ivan Basic.noteZh: 伊万·巴希奇是波黑中路连接点，能帮助中场带球进入空间、提供更安全的传球角度，并避免进攻轻易中断。

Ivan Sunjic.note: Bosnia's defensive-midfield shield, useful for winning loose balls, blocking central lanes, and moving possession on simply.
Ivan Sunjic.noteZh: 伊万·舒尼奇是波黑防守型中场屏障，能争回散落球、封住中路线路，并用简洁传球继续控球。

Jovo Lukic.note: Bosnia's physical forward option, giving them hold-up strength, short layoff passes, and a body to attack crowded penalty areas.
Jovo Lukic.noteZh: 约沃·卢基奇是波黑力量型锋线选择，能背身拿球、做出短距离回做，并在拥挤禁区里提供冲击点。

Kerim Alajbegovic.note: Bosnia's teenage winger, useful for sudden acceleration, cutting inside from the flank, and adding invention around the box.
Kerim Alajbegovic.noteZh: 克里姆·阿拉伊贝戈维奇是波黑年轻边锋，能突然加速、从边路内切，并在禁区周围增加创造力。

Martin Zlomislic.note: Bosnia's goalkeeping option, giving them shot-stopping depth, cross claiming, and calmer restarts after defensive pressure.
Martin Zlomislic.noteZh: 马丁·兹洛米斯利奇是波黑门将选择，能提供扑救深度、摘下传中，并在防守受压后冷静重新开球。

Mladen Jurkas.note: Bosnia's young goalkeeper, useful for his reach, shot-stopping base, and added depth behind the senior keeper group.
Mladen Jurkas.noteZh: 姆拉登·尤尔卡斯是波黑年轻门将，能依靠臂展和扑救基础，为资深门将组身后增加深度。

Nihad Mujakic.note: Bosnia's left-sided centre-back, helping them defend aerially, cover space behind the full-back, and clear pressure from the box.
Nihad Mujakic.noteZh: 尼哈德·穆亚基奇是波黑左侧中卫，能争顶防守、覆盖边后卫身后空间，并把禁区压力解围出去。

Nikola Katic.note: Bosnia's aggressive centre-back, giving them aerial defending, set-piece presence, and front-foot challenges against target forwards.
Nikola Katic.noteZh: 尼科拉·卡蒂奇是波黑主动型中卫，能提供空中防守、定位球存在感，并前压对抗支点前锋。

Nikola Vasilj.note: Bosnia's senior goalkeeper, giving the back line reflex saves, area control, and a reliable first pass after saves.
Nikola Vasilj.noteZh: 尼科拉·瓦西利是波黑资深门将，能为防线提供反应扑救、禁区控制，以及扑救后的可靠第一脚传球。

Samed Bazdar.note: Bosnia's sharp forward runner, useful for attacking channels, pressing centre-backs, and finishing before defenders can reset.
Samed Bazdar.noteZh: 萨梅德·巴日达尔是波黑犀利的前插型前锋，能冲击肋部通道、压迫中卫，并在防守重组前完成终结。

Sead Kolasinac.note: Bosnia's powerful left-sided defender, giving them duel strength, recovery cover, and the ability to carry out of pressure.
Sead Kolasinac.noteZh: 塞亚德·科拉希纳茨是波黑强力左侧后卫，能提供对抗强度、回追保护，并带球摆脱压力。

Stjepan Radeljic.note: Bosnia's reliable centre-back depth, useful for aerial clearances, compact defending, and simple passes into midfield.
Stjepan Radeljic.noteZh: 斯捷潘·拉德利奇是波黑可靠的中卫深度，能完成空中解围、保持紧凑防守，并把球简单传入中场。

Tarik Muharemovic.note: Bosnia's composed young centre-back, giving them progressive passing, recovery speed, and another calm option under pressure.
Tarik Muharemovic.noteZh: 塔里克·穆哈雷莫维奇是波黑冷静的年轻中卫，能提供向前传球、回追速度，以及受压时的另一名稳定选择。
